title: moltbot
summary:
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞  
 EXFOLIATE! EXFOLIATE! Moltbot is a personal AI assistant you run on your own devices. It answers you on the channels you already use WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Google Chat, Signal, iMessage, Microsoft Teams, WebChat, plus extension channels like BlueBubbles, Matrix, Zalo, and Zalo Personal. It can speak and listen on macOSiOSAndroid, and can render a live Canvas you control. The Gateway is just the control plane
